code:
export const breeds = [{
  id: "gir",
  name: "Gir",
  type: "Cattle",
  origin: "Gujarat, India",
  shortDescription: "Resilient dairy cattle known for heat tolerance and high milk fat.",
  characteristics: "Long ears, domed forehead, reddish coat, calm temperament.",
  milkProduction: "10-15 liters/day (can vary by feed and management)",
  image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1545468800-85cc9bc6ecf7?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80"
}, {
  id: "holstein-friesian",
  name: "Holstein Friesian",
  type: "Cattle",
  origin: "Netherlands",
  shortDescription: "Globally popular high-yield dairy breed with black-and-white patches.",
  characteristics: "Large frame, high feed intake, strong dairy performance.",
  milkProduction: "20-35+ liters/day in intensive systems",
  image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1516467508483-a7212febe31a?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80"
}, {
  id: "jersey",
  name: "Jersey",
  type: "Cattle",
  origin: "Channel Island of Jersey",
  shortDescription: "Compact dairy breed known for rich milk with high butterfat.",
  characteristics: "Light brown coat, smaller body, efficient feed conversion.",
  milkProduction: "12-20 liters/day with high fat percentage",
  image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1596733430284-f7437764b1a9?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80"
}, {
  id: "sahiwal",
  name: "Sahiwal",
  type: "Cattle",
  origin: "Punjab region (India/Pakistan)",
  shortDescription: "Tropical dairy breed valued for disease resistance and adaptability.",
  characteristics: "Reddish dun coat, loose skin, tolerant to heat and parasites.",
  milkProduction: "8-14 liters/day in tropical conditions",
  image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1570042225831-d98fa7577f1e?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80"
}, {
  id: "murrah",
  name: "Murrah",
  type: "Buffalo",
  origin: "Haryana, India",
  shortDescription: "Premier dairy buffalo breed with very high fat milk.",
  characteristics: "Jet-black body, tightly curled horns, robust build.",
  milkProduction: "8-16 liters/day with high fat content",
  image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1527153857715-3908f2bae5e8?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80"
}, {
  id: "jaffrabadi",
  name: "Jaffrabadi",
  type: "Buffalo",
  origin: "Gujarat, India",
  shortDescription: "Large buffalo breed suited for milk and draft utility.",
  characteristics: "Massive frame, broad forehead, heavy drooping horns.",
  milkProduction: "6-12 liters/day depending on management",
  image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517849845537-4d257902454a?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80"
}];
export const getBreedById = id => breeds.find(breed => breed.id === id);

sourcesContent:
export const breeds = [
  {
    id: "gir",
    name: "Gir",
    type: "Cattle",
    origin: "Gujarat, India",
    shortDescription: "Resilient dairy cattle known for heat tolerance and high milk fat.",
    characteristics: "Long ears, domed forehead, reddish coat, calm temperament.",
    milkProduction: "10-15 liters/day (can vary by feed and management)",
    image:
      "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1545468800-85cc9bc6ecf7?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80",
  },
  {
    id: "holstein-friesian",
    name: "Holstein Friesian",
    type: "Cattle",
    origin: "Netherlands",
    shortDescription: "Globally popular high-yield dairy breed with black-and-white patches.",
    characteristics: "Large frame, high feed intake, strong dairy performance.",
    milkProduction: "20-35+ liters/day in intensive systems",
    image:
      "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1516467508483-a7212febe31a?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80",
  },
  {
    id: "jersey",
    name: "Jersey",
    type: "Cattle",
    origin: "Channel Island of Jersey",
    shortDescription: "Compact dairy breed known for rich milk with high butterfat.",
    characteristics: "Light brown coat, smaller body, efficient feed conversion.",
    milkProduction: "12-20 liters/day with high fat percentage",
    image:
      "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1596733430284-f7437764b1a9?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80",
  },
  {
    id: "sahiwal",
    name: "Sahiwal",
    type: "Cattle",
    origin: "Punjab region (India/Pakistan)",
    shortDescription: "Tropical dairy breed valued for disease resistance and adaptability.",
    characteristics: "Reddish dun coat, loose skin, tolerant to heat and parasites.",
    milkProduction: "8-14 liters/day in tropical conditions",
    image:
      "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1570042225831-d98fa7577f1e?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80",
  },
  {
    id: "murrah",
    name: "Murrah",
    type: "Buffalo",
    origin: "Haryana, India",
    shortDescription: "Premier dairy buffalo breed with very high fat milk.",
    characteristics: "Jet-black body, tightly curled horns, robust build.",
    milkProduction: "8-16 liters/day with high fat content",
    image:
      "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1527153857715-3908f2bae5e8?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80",
  },
  {
    id: "jaffrabadi",
    name: "Jaffrabadi",
    type: "Buffalo",
    origin: "Gujarat, India",
    shortDescription: "Large buffalo breed suited for milk and draft utility.",
    characteristics: "Massive frame, broad forehead, heavy drooping horns.",
    milkProduction: "6-12 liters/day depending on management",
    image:
      "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517849845537-4d257902454a?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80",
  },
];

export const getBreedById = (id) => breeds.find((breed) => breed.id === id);
